methodology.annual_growth: Volume-weighted mean of link YoY trajectory growth (2016-2026); COVID years 2020-21 down-weighted x0.25; capped |g|<=50%/yr.
methodology.monthly_growth: Volume-weighted YoY same-month growth from ATC monthly ADT series (2016-2022) converted to a compound monthly rate; links without an ATC series use (1+g_annual)^(1/12)-1.
methodology.seasonal_factors: Mean monthly ATC ADT per calendar month / overall mean per ATC site (ATC DATA SUMMARY 2016-2022); fallback region average then national average. Clamped [0.5, 1.6].
methodology.od_demand_index: Region trip-end share from Uganda Nationwide OD survey (row+column sums of region matrix, normalised to mean=1).
